report_name: Braintrust AI Platform Breach Exposes Customer API Keys in AWS Account

threat_actors.name: Unauthorized Braintrust Attacker
threat_actors.description: An unidentified actor who gained unauthorized access to a Braintrust AWS account on May 4, 2026, exfiltrated customer API keys, and subsequently abused them, creating a significant supply chain risk.
threat_actors.goals: Steal customer API keys for financial gain and data theft.

attack_patterns.name: Valid Accounts: Cloud Accounts
attack_patterns.description: The attacker gained initial access to the Braintrust AWS environment using compromised legitimate credentials for a cloud account, bypassing perimeter defenses.

attack_patterns.name: Data from Cloud Storage
attack_patterns.description: The attacker exfiltrated sensitive customer API keys that were stored within the compromised Braintrust AWS account.

attack_patterns.name: Financial Theft
attack_patterns.description: The attacker abused the stolen API keys to make expensive AI model calls, leading to suspicious usage spikes and financial loss for Braintrust's customers.

identities.name: Braintrust
identities.description: An AI model evaluation and monitoring platform whose AWS account was compromised, leading to the exposure of its customers' API keys.

identities.name: Amazon Web Services
identities.description: The cloud service provider that hosted the compromised Braintrust account where sensitive customer API keys were stored.

identities.name: Braintrust Customers
identities.description: Customers of the Braintrust platform whose API keys were exposed and are at risk of compromise. One customer was confirmed to be directly affected, and three others are investigating suspicious activity.

infrastructure.name: Compromised Braintrust AWS Account
infrastructure.description: An AWS cloud account belonging to Braintrust that was compromised by an attacker to access and exfiltrate stored customer API keys.
